changelog: Fix: Update progress modal now shows 'Service Restarting...' while service is down during update
Fix: About page Update Now / Force Reinstall buttons use inline confirm (no browser-blocked dialog)
Fix: Update notification shows error if update trigger fails instead of silently opening empty modal
Fix: Windows installer now embeds correct server URL (internet_server set in UrBackup DB)
Fix: UrBackup API login handles no-password mode
